name: zola-money-trans
description: Zola Money Trans PWA and Mobile App

scripts.build: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force www -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path www; Copy-Item *.html, manifest.json, sw.js www/; Copy-Item -Recurse css, js, icons www/"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy
